story: Man cut off his own genitals and used them as kindling to burn down the family garage, police say
title: Man's Shocking Self Harm
script: Man cuts off his own genitals. This shocking act was used to burn down his family's garage, sparking a serious arson investigation and raising questions about his mental state. The suspect's intentional actions have led to serious charges, including arson and other crimes. The case is disturbing and bizarre, leaving many to wonder what could drive someone to such extremes. As the investigation unfolds, one thing is certain, the outcome will be closely watched, but what ultimately happens to him now?
